tasks.task_prompt: Go to https://www.ubereats.com/, if prompted enter the delivery address '<ADDRESS>', search for sushi, open a plausible first restaurant result without ordering anything, and report exactly this JSON: {"status":"success","restaurant_name":"<name>","delivery_eta":"<eta or unknown>"}. If location or login blocks progress, return {"status":"error","error":"<what blocked progress>"}.

Go to https://www.ubereats.com/, if prompted enter the delivery address '<ADDRESS>', search for burgers, open a plausible first restaurant result without ordering anything, and report exactly this JSON: {"status":"success","restaurant_name":"<name>","delivery_eta":"<eta or unknown>"}. If location or login blocks progress, return {"status":"error","error":"<what blocked progress>"}.
